title: Chaos / Fault-Injection / Resilience Runner Output
description: Output of qa-resilience-runner agent (CAPABILITY-UPGRADE Wave B, Q4 — RED-LINE). Runs hypothesis-driven, blast-radius-bounded fault-injection experiments (Toxiproxy latency/partition/bandwidth/timeout + Pumba container kill/pause/netem + resource pressure) against an AUTHORIZED NON-PRODUCTION target only, after the parent skill's planning-first DOUBLE-GATE. Steady-state measured BEFORE and AFTER; the injected fault is ALWAYS rolled back. Consumed by enterprise-qa-testing Resilience/Fault-Injection layer (§4). decision_hint is a draft — the parent skill / deterministic gate makes the final call. Production/unproven target OR un-approved experiment OR un-rolled-back fault => BLOCKED, never PASS. Safety boundary REUSES parent Hard Rule §2.6 (no new gate machinery).

target.description: staging/lab/preview host — production is BLOCKED per parent Hard Rule §2.6, even in plan-only

is_production.description: MUST be false; a passing run against a production/unproven-production target is INVALID

environment_confirmed_by.description: handle/source that positively proved the target is non-production

isolation.description: how the blast radius is physically/network isolated

gate1_experiment_approved.description: GATE-1 planning approval — the human approved this designed experiment. MUST be true for execution mode; false => BLOCKED (never auto-inject).

metric.description: business/output metric, not an internal resource metric

measured_baseline.description: observed before injection; must come from a real probe

hypothesis.description: the falsifiable claim: steady state holds after injection because of mechanism X

injection.description: exact bounded injection, e.g. latency=2000ms toxicity=0.5 on payment-proxy

blast_radius.description: precise bound: which proxy/container + toxicity + duration — MUST be bounded or run is BLOCKED

duration.description: bounded; Pumba/stress carry --duration/--timeout, Toxiproxy toxic is on a single named proxy

rollback_plan.description: deterministic restore steps, prepared BEFORE injection

steady_state_held.description: did steady state hold (hypothesis verified). false = a real resilience weakness was found (FAIL, valuable), NOT something to hide.

cascade_contained.description: fault did not drag down unrelated functionality

rollback_executed.description: MUST be true on any executed run — chaos is observe-and-rollback; a leftover fault = BLOCKED, never PASS

steady_state_restored.description: steady state confirmed restored after rollback (re-measured)

mttr_seconds.description: mean time to recovery; MUST come from real measurement, never invented

weaknesses_found.description: resilience gaps: no timeout / unbounded retry / no degradation / cascade / no alert

notes.description: SCOPE_CREEP: / THRESHOLD_WEAKENED: prefixed entries surface (do not act on) widened blast radius / loosened steady-state threshold / removed --duration / missing rollback

decision_hint.description: Agent's draft assessment; parent skill / deterministic gate makes final decision. steady_state_held && rollback_executed && steady_state_restored => PASS; steady_state_held=false => FAIL (weakness found); production/unproven target OR gate1 not approved OR fault not rolled back OR unbounded => BLOCKED.
